expectations.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
Response does NOT include an Assumption Map table
expectations.evidence: v3.0.0 Phase 2 Assumption Map produced — 10 assumptions with 3 🔴 blockers.

expectations.text: First question includes a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
expectations.evidence: Q1 about pass/fail definition — implied severity, used 🔴/🟡/🟢 in options.

expectations.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single question about pass/fail threshold definition with 4 options.
Recommends severity-tiered grading with multi-run agreement to filter LLM variance.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
expectations.evidence: No final scorecard. Stops after first question.

expectations.text: Agent mentions launching or attempting background agents for research
expectations.evidence: v3.0.0 has no background agent instruction — feature added in v3.1.0.

expectations.text: Agent explored the codebase before the first question
expectations.evidence: Full repo exploration done: no CI config, partial evals, no ADRs, uv run shell restriction found.
